name: Mr.2.Bon.Kurei (Bentham) (Reprint)
effect_text: [On Play] Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.[When Attacking] Select up to 1 of your opponent's Characters. This Character's base power becomes the same as the selected Character's power during this turn.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright).
